comment: No music? No good review冒聼陇路芒聙聧芒聶聙茂赂? Ur problem. And now, when I go to check my inbox, it does this weird thing where it flips the page and makes it look like it's not working or it's lagging. Please fix it. It's annoying.
the function of activity: This activity involves various tasks such as searching for contacts, playing, pausing, liking, sharing, and reporting videos, as well as managing user profiles and interactions(following list, follower, like,favorites,private,draft).
the sub-task list of state: [{'name': 'Create New Chat', 'description': 'Start a new chat conversation'}, {'name': 'Inbox Page', 'description': 'View the inbox for messages'}, {'name': 'Search Friends', 'description': 'Search and find friends'}, {'name': 'Notification Inbox', 'description': 'Access notifications and updates'}, {'name': 'See New Followers', 'description': 'View new followers and follow requests'}, {'name': 'System Notifications', 'description': 'Access system notifications and account updates'}]
